R0220.title: Virtual World Economic Manipulation
R0220.definition: Attackers manipulate metaverse economic systems by hoarding virtual land, monopolizing virtual currency, causing speculative bubbles.

references.title: 元宇宙经济系统安全风险

R0220.description: Attackers manipulate metaverse economic systems by hoarding virtual land, monopolizing virtual currency, causing speculative bubbles.
R0220.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
